abilities.description: Choose a player with the most life or tied for most life. Target creature can't be blocked by creatures that player controls this turn.

effect.description: Choose a player with the most life or tied for most life. Target creature can't be blocked by creatures that player controls this turn.
effect.name: ChoosePlayer

replacements.description: As CARDNAME enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
